prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `ac2e8ecf`.
codex_response:
Rule: identify each non-background object, treat true hollow rectangular frames as one class and all row-and-column cross/T shapes as the other, then slide frames upward and non-frames downward as far as possible while preserving columns and collision-constrained order. `arc2_opus46_summary.json` was used; `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` was discarded because it incorrectly split by upper-vs-lower input half instead of by shape class.

The package is implemented and validated. `python -m arc2.shared.verify --task ac2e8ecf` passed `4/4` official examples, `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task ac2e8ecf` passed `1000/1000` generated examples, and the generated samples/previews look on-family: small hollow frames plus line/cross/T motifs on `13x13` to `17x17` grids with mixed vertical placement and packed top/bottom outputs. No new reusable DSL primitive was needed; I only added task-local helpers.

**Paths**
- Task package: [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ac2e8ecf/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ac2e8ecf/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ac2e8ecf/generator.py), [helpers.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ac2e8ecf/helpers.py), [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ac2e8ecf/notes.md)
- Generated task data: [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ac2e8ecf/task.json)
